body:
I do not use words like "thanks" and "please" in my issues.
Straight to the point!

desc: I found the answer to the ultimate question of life, the universe, and everything!
I merged a PR with failing checks
body: Pull requests: - #77: feat(us-congress): one-click production deploy with digest-verified images - #78: feat(us-congress): post-deploy external health check - #79: feat(us-congress): automated changelog stamp on deploy (task 0006) - #82: feat(us-congress): rollback & on-demand redeploy (task 0007) - #83: docs(us-congress): deployment pipeline docs and operator runbook - #84: ci(us-congress): pin actions to node24-runtime majors - #86: fix: relocate Superpowers artifacts out of root docs/ to unblock deploy - #88: Pipeline DAG manifest, PIPELINE.md generator + --check drift validator - #90: feat(us-congress): bills connector core — Congress.gov fetch/load, raw_payloads, connector contract - #98: feat(bills): per-bill fan-out — cosponsors, subjects, summaries, detail, titles (task 0011)
